title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring · Operations Brief: Net Discovery Mirroring Monitoring
summary: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net discovery mirroring monitoring increment in an operations and observability runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use scheduled or ad hoc discovery, port mirroring, and traffic, performance, availability, and configuration monitoring.
Aggregate syslog and application events, correlate in SIEM, and integrate APIs with time, identity, parsing, retention, and access controls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
